title: The Corporate Laws (Amendment) Bill, 2026: Charting a new course for corporate regulations
description: The Corporate Laws (Amendment) Bill, 2026 (the "Bill"), introduced in the Lok Sabha on March 23, 2026, represents significant legislative intervention in Indian company law. Based on the recommendations of the Company Law Committee Report of 2022, it proposes amendments to both the Companies Act, 2013 (the "Act") and the Limited Liability Partnership Act, 2008, and is currently referred to a Joint Parliamentary Committee for further review. The Bill seeks to achieve three core objectives: ration
